title: 2018–19 Celtic F.C. season
body: The 2018–19 season was Celtic's 130th season of competitive football. They competed in the Scottish Premiership, Scottish Cup, League Cup, UEFA Champions League and UEFA Europa League. Celtic won all three domestic tournaments, completing an unprecedented treble treble.
categories: Articles with unsourced statements from April 2018
Pages using football kit with incorrect pattern parameters
Short description is different from Wikidata
